greeting.line: Steam rises. Cup fills. Your order's ready. Steam rises. Cup fills.
greeting.line_friendly: You took the cup. Good. That keeps the loop kind.
greeting.line_hostile: Don't take the cup. Don't come back. The hallway prefers that.

lore.line: I hand you the cup. I always hand you the cup. If you take it, we start again. If you don't take it... nobody's ever not taken it.
